messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill and downloading the document simultaneously.





Now I will analyze the downloaded lab report document from the URL using the BloomCell framework. Based on the PDF content extracted from `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584203216703181011Document_2.pdf`, I'll apply the full BloomCell 4-step analysis and produce the 8 required JSON objects.

After thoroughly analyzing the lab report PDF (Document_2.pdf) using the BloomCell clinical framework — extracting biomarkers, comparing against functional ranges, identifying patterns, and applying the 4-step analysis logic — here are the 8 structured output objects. I'll now proceed to build merged records and store them.





Now storing all 8 merged records one by one. Starting with Record 1:Record 1 saved ✅. Storing Record 2:Record 2 saved ✅. Storing Record 3:Record 3 saved ✅. Storing Record 4:Record 4 saved ✅. Storing Record 5:Record 5 saved ✅. Storing Record 6:Record 6 saved ✅. Storing Record 7:Record 7 saved ✅. Storing Record 8:8 records saved successfully.



Now updating the original PatientDocument record:Document updated successfully.
